sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_strings (id Int32, name String, description String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;

INSERT INTO test_strings VALUES (1, 'Alice', 'A software engineer'), (2, 'Bob', 'A data scientist'), (3, NULL, 'NULL name'), (4, 'Dave', 'NULL description'), (5, 'Eve', 'A quiet coder'), (6, '', 'Empty name');
SELECT id, name FROM test_strings WHERE positionCaseInsensitiveUTF8(name, 'alice') >= 1;
SELECT id, name FROM test_strings WHERE positionCaseInsensitiveUTF8(name, 'ALICE') >= 1 AND description IS NOT NULL;
SELECT MAX(id) AS max_id, COUNT(*) FROM test_strings GROUP BY positionCaseInsensitiveUTF8(name, 'A%') HAVING max_id >= 2;
SELECT t1.id, t1.name FROM test_strings t1 JOIN test_strings t2 ON (t1.id >= t2.id OR positionCaseInsensitiveUTF8(t2.description, 'coder') > 0);
SELECT name, CASE WHEN positionCaseInsensitiveUTF8(name, 'data') >= 1 THEN 'Contains data' ELSE 'No data' END as data_check FROM test_strings;
SELECT id, name FROM test_strings WHERE (positionCaseInsensitiveUTF8(name, 'e') >= 1 OR (name IS NULL AND description IS NOT NULL)) ORDER BY name;
CREATE TABLE test_numbers (num Int32) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY num;
INSERT INTO test_numbers VALUES (0), (1), (2), (3), (4), (5), (NULL);
SELECT n.num, positionCaseInsensitiveUTF8(CAST(n.num AS String), '2') >= 1 FROM test_numbers AS n;
SELECT n.num, COUNT(*) FROM test_numbers n WHERE n.num IS NOT NULL GROUP BY positionCaseInsensitiveUTF8(CAST(n.num AS String), '') HAVING COUNT(*) >= 1;
SELECT name, positionCaseInsensitiveUTF8(name, 'null') >= 1 AS is_null_check FROM test_strings WHERE description IS NOT NULL;
SELECT t1.id, t1.name FROM test_strings t1 LEFT JOIN test_numbers t2 ON (t1.id >= toInt32(t2.num));
CREATE TABLE temp_test (value Float64) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY value;
SELECT value FROM temp_test WHERE value <= 5.5 AND positionCaseInsensitiveUTF8(CAST(value AS String), '0.1') >= 1;
ALTER TABLE test_strings ADD COLUMN additional_info Nullable(String);
UPDATE test_strings SET additional_info = 'Extra information' WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, COALESCE(additional_info, 'No info') AS final_info, positionCaseInsensitiveUTF8(final_info, 'info') >= 1 FROM test_strings;
